channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Windows 10 to Windows 11 Transition: What You Need to Know
item.description: Microsoft's support for Windows 10 ends on October 14, 2025, but the switch to Windows 11 is happening slowly due to stricter hardware requirements. Here's what you need to know about the transition and its impact on Microsoft-365 apps and Office versions.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
